title: Alternating Toll
concept_pitch: Prefix-transform alternating range sums into O(1) queries.

title: Balanced Pairing
concept_pitch: Sort and pair adjacent values to minimize the worst gap.

title: Rain Schedule
concept_pitch: Range updates collapse to boundary markers plus one prefix pass.

title: Budgeted Sprint
concept_pitch: Positive costs let a two-pointer window move monotonically.

title: Median Upgrade
concept_pitch: Only the upper half matters; binary-search the achievable median.

title: Previous Higher Beacon
concept_pitch: Maintain a decreasing stack of candidate previous-greater positions.

title: Window Champion
concept_pitch: A monotonic deque keeps the maximum candidate for each window in O(n).

title: Hall Reservations
concept_pitch: Sort starts and ends separately, and sweep current overlap count.

title: Signal Maze
concept_pitch: Unweighted grid shortest path is plain BFS.

title: Semester Signals
concept_pitch: Topological order plus longest-path depth in a DAG gives semester count.

title: Cut Value Tree
concept_pitch: One subtree-size pass evaluates every edge cut in O(n).

title: Alliance Desk
concept_pitch: Classic DSU with union by size and path compression.

title: Courier Paths
concept_pitch: Non-negative edges make Dijkstra the right shortest-path tool.

title: Score Ledger

title: Blocked Orchard

title: Tower Parade

title: Border Echoes

title: Warehouse Lanes

title: Shipment Split

title: Mirror Prefix Search
concept_pitch: Use Z on p + '#' + t and read off exact matches.

title: Residue Triples

title: Fire Stations

title: Broken Network

title: Festival Squares

title: Echo Equality
